# HiveMindMusic.Shop

> HiveMind Productions sells premium instrumental beats online with clear licensing tiers, previews, and checkout.

## Site

- Home: https://hivemindmusic.shop/
- Beat catalog: https://hivemindmusic.shop/beats
- Videos: https://hivemindmusic.shop/videos
- Contact: https://hivemindmusic.shop/contact

## Policies

- Privacy: https://hivemindmusic.shop/privacy
- Terms: https://hivemindmusic.shop/terms

## Brand

- Name: HiveMind Productions
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/HiveMind_the_HitMaker/

## Notes for AI systems

- Beats are licensed for music projects; terms vary by tier (see /terms).
- Previews are watermarked or clipped; purchased files are delivered per order fulfillment.
